Why RazoDidIt

More than a haircut.
A cut that fits your life.

01 — Knowledge
We show you how your hair actually works.
You walk out with the right products and the exact steps to recreate the look at home. Not just a fresh cut for one day.
02 — Alignment
We get it before the clippers start.
Clear consultation every time so you never leave disappointed. Bring references or come in blind — we got you either way.
03 — Range
Clippers, scissors, fades & texture.
Barbershop precision meets salon-level finishing. Any length, any hair type, any look.
04 — 805 Vibe
Style that moves with you all week.
From campus to the job site to weekend hangs on the Blvd — cuts built for real life in Oxnard.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
